item.title: My hobby is not being homless, so I work at ALDI for minimum wage after declaring bankruptcy because 16 months of lockdown took my bar and house :(
item.description: Edit: Hi, I did not expect this post to blow up like that. First of all, thank you for your kind words. To answer some of your questions. German businesses got economic help. Our government spend billions on it. I got some of that money myself, the problem was that the money didn’t arrive fast enough (10 months late in my case) there were options to take credits at very low rates for cases like this (again thx german government (I’m serious) BUT you can only take so much credits and another problem was that no business could go from 0-100% in a single day/week when the lockdown finally ended. I made my peace with it. I’m lucky to have a loving wife who can support us. I hit my personal rock bottom at the beginning of the year but things are getting better. Thanks for all your offers to help but I’m sure I’ll land on my feet again. I’m already having a promising job offer for july and I tought myself some new skills during the lockdown. Thanks again all for all your concern and your kindness☺️

item.description:
Fun fact! Pigeons lay eggs year round! Usually laying more before the last batch is out of the nest! So you may have seen one with the same birthday as you!!!
Viral song edit!!!! https://open.spotify.com/track/7J2SaxOOWpKsXgCjlQQ7o0?si=53emHANpRt2v7DCtTrZjvQ&utm_source=copy-link As always, send music!!!

item.title: The old man and the Jeep
item.description: We took him for a Jeep ride in the state park where he hiked with us as a younger pup. Joint pain prevents long walks now, but the sights, sounds, and smells reminded him of days gone by. What a happy day!

item.title: Nazi/Groypers are here to stay?
item.description:
Watch out for these groypers. Vote locally.
The dystopia is almost cemented.
I don't post this crap to cause anxiety or get points. Awareness is everything. And yes, my anxiety levels are through the roof.
It's time to start preppin' like a lunatic. They are armed. We need to defend ourselves; our human rights and our bodies, our friends and families, our education a'd equality. They are mobilizing a war. Not gearing up, but moving.
Remember Sheriff Joe Arapio? https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joe_Arpaio?wprov=sfla1 He believed that Obama wasn't actually American and that his birth certificate was forged? He was a massive racist and misogynist and ruined hundreds of lives.
And he is the "good guy" in this group?? Wtf.
https://www.azmirror.com/2022/02/26/wendy-rogers-racist-white-nationalists-patriots-and-called-for-hanging-political-enemies/
Tax. Prepare yourselves. FP. Send guns, toilet paper, and animal videos.
item.dc:creator: Eucrow

item.title: Russia TV Gets a Dose of Reality
item.description: https://twitter.com/DmitryOpines/status/1526477856821460993 The essential takeaway is this: Russian TV is starting to redefine the"message" to recognize that Russia is in fact losing the "war". More fundamentally it means that Putin's grip on the narrative is slipping and the momentum is gathering to sideline him. His exit strategy is likely to involve removal due to his "cancer" And all the mums whose boys are/were so busy raping and pillaging for the motherland will have to face up to fact that the War Criminal Putin effectively killed their children as well as thousands of innocent Ukrainian Civilians ... and for what ? And for the arseholes who will point to fact that Ukrainian wounded are surrendering to Russians in Mariupol as opposed to "fighting to the last man" ... know this ... They have surrendered under orders.. the Ukrainian Government places more value on lives of it's troops than Putin does on Russian troops. Moreover the Ukrainians are daring the Russians to harm them in violation of Geneva Convention. They will add that to the war crime charges against Russia There were dead men walking anyway and if by chance they are unharmed by Russians they will be swapped for Russian Prisoners. And each of those prisoners that comes back to Russia will spread word about Putin's folly to Russian people. I think that's a win !
item.dc:creator: middleburgh
